name: Docker Compose --env-file Required on Every Command
insight: When docker-compose.yml uses ${VAR} syntax with --env-file, that flag must be on EVERY docker compose invocation. Docker defaults unset vars to empty strings WITHOUT error, so services start with blank secrets and fail at runtime.
symptoms: compose output full of 'variable is not set' warnings
fix: Always use: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.integra.yml --env-file docker/.env.integra up -d. Use --no-deps to restart only one service without cascading recreation.
